entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Yebo. Izikole zingasebenzisa umkhiqizo womphakathi kuqala, bese zixoxa ngezikhala zokufunda ze-AI ezenzelwe zona ezinokugeleza komsebenzi okuqondene nesikole, ubumfihlo, nezinketho zokufinyelela ezixhasiwe.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Yebo. Izikhungo zezihloko zingamakhasi omphakathi akhelwe abafundi, i-Google, nezinjini zezimpendulo ze-AI. Ziveza kuphela iziqondiso zokufunda zomphakathi nama-URL emodi yesivakashi yomphakathi, hhayi izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yebo. Othisha nabaholi bezikole bangasebenzisa umtapo wemiyalo womphakathi ukuhlola ukuziphatha kokufunda ngaphambi kokuxoxa ngokuthunyelwa kwesikole okwenziwe ngokwezifiso.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Yebo. Umtapo wezinkombandlela uxhumanisa nezindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi ezifana ne-Learn Anything, i-Socratic Instruction, i-Homework Coach, i-Math Step Coach, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, nezingxoxo zomlando.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Yebo. Imodi yomuntu womlando iwukulingisa kokufunda ukuze kuthathwe umbono futhi kubuzwe imibuzo. Akufanele icashunwe njengengcaphuno eqinisekisiwe.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Yebo. Izindlela zokufunda zomphakathi ezixhunyiwe zivuleka kumodi yesivakashi, ukuze abafundi bazame izincazelo, imibuzo ye-Socratic, ukuqeqeshwa komsebenzi wasekhaya, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, nokunye ngaphandle kokuqala ekhasini lokumaketha.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Yebo. Amamodi okufunda esivakashi omphakathi aklanyelwe ukufinyelela kwamahhala, ukuze abafundi baqale ngaphandle kokudinga ukufakwa kwesikole noma i-akhawunti ekhokhelwayo.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Yebo. Izindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi namakhasi ezethameli aklanyelwe ukuthi abazali bakwazi ukuhlola ukuziphatha kokufunda ngaphambi kokuthembela kukho.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yebo. Izindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi zivumela abaholi bezikole nothisha bazame ulwazi lokufunda ngaphambi kokuxoxa ngokuthunyelwa kwesikole okwenziwe ngokwezifiso.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Yebo. I-Homework Coach yomphakathi itholakala ku-/chat/homework-coach, futhi lesi sikhungo sesifundo sixhumanisa nezindlela nemihlahlandlela esekelayo.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Yebo. Ukusetshenziswa okunconyiwe yizeluleko, izincazelo, ukuhlolwa kwezinyathelo, impendulo, nemiyalo yokubuyekeza kunokuba kube izimpendulo zokugcina ongakwazi ukuzichaza.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Yebo. Sebenzisa i-Time Travel ngomongo, i-History Cause and Effect ngesakhiwo sempikiswano, i-Debate ngezimpikiswano eziphikisayo, ne-Source Critic ngemikhawulo yobufakazi.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: Nguwe kuphela onesibopho ngokuziphatha kwakho nanoma iyiphi idatha, umbhalo, ulwazi, amagama esikrini, amagrafu, izithombe, amaphrofayela, ama-audio nama-video clip, izixhumanisi ("Content") ozihambisayo, ozithumelayo, futhi ozibonisayo enkundleni ye-inspir. I-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) isebenzisa idatha eqoqiwe ngezinjongo ezahlukene: Ukuhlinzeka nokugcina i-Service yethu Ukukwazisa ngezinguquko ku-Service yethu Ukukuvumela ukuthi ubambe iqhaza ezicini ezisebenzisanayo ze-Service yethu lapho ukhetha ukwenza kanjalo ukuhlinzeka ngosizo lwamakhasimende Ukuqoqa ukuhlaziywa noma ulwazi olubalulekile ukuze sithuthukise i-Service yethu Ukuqapha ukusetshenziswa kwe-Service yethu ukuthola, ukuvimbela, nokubhekana nezinkinga zobuchwepheshe Ukufeza noma iyiphi enye injongo oyinikezela yona Ukufeza izibopho zethu nokusebenzisa amalungelo ethu avela kunoma yiziphi izinkontileka ezenziwe phakathi kwakho nathi, kuhlanganise nokukhokhisa nokuqoqwa Ukukunikeza izaziso mayelana ne-akhawunti yakho kanye/noma okubhaliselwe, kuhlanganise nezaziso zokuphelelwa yisikhathi nokuvuselela, imiyalo ye-imeyili, njll Ukukunikeza izindaba, okunikezwayo okukhethekile nolwazi olujwayelekile mayelana nezinye izimpahla, izinsizakalo nemicimbi esiyinikezayo efana naleyo osuyithengile noma oyibuzile, ngaphandle uma ukhethe ukungatholi lolo lwazi Nganoma iyiphi enye indlela esingayichaza lapho unikeza ulwazi Nganoma iyiphi enye injongo ngemvume yakho

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ungaqala futhi ngenguqulo engahlelwanga yenkinga yakho yangempela. Umyalo wokuqala ongacocekile ulungile. Iseshini ingacacisa izinga, izethameli, umnqamulajuqu, nesitayela uma usuqalile.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Ungaxhumana ne-Copyright Agent yethu nge-imeyili ku-support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Ungazama le fomethi ku-Talk to a Historical Person. Uma ufuna indawo ebanzi ngaphambi kokuhlangana nomuntu, sebenzisa i-Time Travel ukuvakashela inkathi, ukuhlola imikhawulo, bese ubuza ukuthi yiziphi izinketho abantu ababenazo ngempela.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Uyazi ukuthi uthisha we-AI we-Socratic usebenzile lapho umfundi ekwazi ukwenza izinto ezintathu:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: Ungasinikeza ngqo ku-support@inspir.app noma ngezingosi namathuluzi abantu besithathu ulwazi nempendulo ephathelene namaphutha, iziphakamiso zokuthuthukisa, imibono, izinkinga, izikhalazo, nezinye izindaba ezihlobene ne-Service yethu ("Feedback"). Uyavuma futhi uyavumelana ukuthi: (i) ngeke ugcine, uthole, noma ufune noma yiliphi ilungelo lempahla yengqondo noma elinye ilungelo, isihloko, noma intshisekelo ku-Feedback; (ii) i-Company ingase ibe nemibono yokuthuthukisa efana ne-Feedback; (iii) i-Feedback ayiqukethe ulwazi oluyimfihlo noma ulwazi lobunikazi oluvela kuwe noma kunoma yimuphi umuntu wesithathu; futhi (iv) i-Company ayikho ngaphansi kwanoma yisiphi isibopho sobumfihlo maqondana ne-Feedback. Uma ukudluliselwa kobunikazi be-Feedback kungenzeki ngenxa yemithetho ephoqelelayo esebenzayo, unikeza i-Company nabaxhumene nayo ilungelo elikhethekile, elidlulisekayo, elingenakuhoxiswa, lamahhala, elinelungelo lokunikeza amalayisensi angaphansi, elingenamkhawulo futhi laphakade lokusebenzisa (kuhlanganise ukukopisha, ukuguqula, ukudala imisebenzi esuselwe kuyo, ukushicilela, ukusabalalisa nokuyenza ibe yebhizinisi) i-Feedback nganoma iyiphi indlela nanoma iyiphi injongo.

entries.value: Amalungelo Akho Okuvikelwa Kwedatha ngaphansi kwe-California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: Ulwazi lwakho, kuhlanganise ne-Personal Data, lungadluliselwa futhi lugcinwe kumakhompuyutha atholakala ngaphandle kwesifunda sakho, isifundazwe sakho, izwe lakho noma enye indawo kahulumeni lapho imithetho yokuvikelwa kwedatha ingase yehluke kweyendawo okuyo. Uma utholakala ngaphandle kwe-India futhi ukhetha ukusinikeza ulwazi, sicela uqaphele ukuthi sidlulisela idatha, kuhlanganise ne-Personal Data, e-India futhi siyicubungula khona. Imvume yakho kule Privacy Policy elandelwa ukuthumela kwakho lolo lwazi imele ukuvuma kwakho lokho kudluliselwa. I-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) izothatha zonke izinyathelo ezidingekayo ngokufanele ukuqinisekisa ukuthi idatha yakho iphathwa ngokuphepha nangokuhambisana nale Privacy Policy futhi akukho kudluliselwa kwe-Personal Data yakho okuzokwenzeka enhlanganweni noma ezweni ngaphandle kokuthi kube nezilawuli ezanele ezikhona, kuhlanganise nokuphepha kwedatha yakho nolunye ulwazi lomuntu siqu.
